subject: Science
description: Full K-12 Science curriculum with interactive Phaser-backed lessons

lessons.title: Animal Safari Adventure
lessons.subject: Science
lessons.storyHook: You are a wildlife photographer on safari. Take pictures of animals by answering questions about their habitats.

lessons.title: Plant Lifecycle Quest
lessons.subject: Science
lessons.storyHook: You are a botanist exploring the Amazon rainforest. Grow plants by answering lifecycle questions correctly.

lessons.title: Solar System Navigator
lessons.subject: Science
lessons.storyHook: You are a space pilot. Navigate the asteroid belt by ordering planets correctly.

lessons.title: Weather Station Manager
lessons.subject: Science
lessons.storyHook: You run a weather station. Predict storms by analyzing cloud patterns and temperature data.

lessons.title: Human Body Expedition
lessons.subject: Science
lessons.storyHook: You are a tiny explorer inside the human body. Navigate organs by answering biology questions.

lessons.title: Ecosystem Balancer
lessons.subject: Science
lessons.storyHook: You are an ecologist. Restore balance to a damaged ecosystem by making the right intervention choices.

lessons.title: Chemistry Lab Escape
lessons.subject: Science
lessons.storyHook: You are trapped in a chemistry lab. Solve reaction puzzles to unlock the exit.

lessons.title: Physics Tower Builder
lessons.subject: Science
lessons.storyHook: You are an engineer. Build a tower that withstands earthquakes using physics principles.

lessons.title: Genetics Match
lessons.subject: Science
lessons.storyHook: You are a genetic counselor. Match traits to genotypes to help families understand heredity.

lessons.title: Climate Change Strategist
lessons.subject: Science
lessons.storyHook: You are a UN climate advisor. Make policy decisions that balance economy and environment.

lessons.title: Astronomy Voyage
lessons.subject: Science
lessons.storyHook: You are an astronaut on a deep-space mission. Navigate by identifying stars and galaxies.

lessons.title: Neuroscience Lab
lessons.subject: Science
lessons.storyHook: You are a neuroscientist. Design experiments to understand how the brain learns.
